items.title: My list of questions
items.summary:
Here’s a live list of questions that I don’t yet know the answer to. I’ll update it as I find out the answer, or, more likely, as I just add more and more questions.

Physics

  • How do electromagnetic fields work?
  • Where does magnetism come from?
  • Why is nuclear fusion difficult to achieve?
  • How do wires transmit electricity if electrons aren’t running along through them?
  • How do we know that subatomic particles exist?
  • Why is it impossible to surpass the speed of light?
  • Why does time pass at different speeds depending on gravity?

Chemistry

  • How do you make explosives out of household chemicals?

Mathematics

  • What is the P/NP problem and why is it important?
  • What is Gödel’s incompleteness theorem?

Biology

  • What’s the mechanism of aging?
  • How do we know how DNA works?
  • How do genes function?
  • What are RNA precursor chemicals?

Cryptography

  • How does the Diffie-Hellman key exchange work?
  • What are zkSNARKs?

Computer science

  • How exactly does Dijkstra’s pathfinding algorithm work?
  • What even is a Turing machine?

Philosophy

  • What is sentience?

Engineering

  • How do RFID readers work?
  • How do semiconductors work and why are they important?
